title: Pseudo-Real Documents
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for fictional specimen documents that test readable typography, paper physics, print texture, stamps, handwriting, and commercial mockup realism.

zh-CN.title: 伪真实文档 · 票据 / 护照 / 药方 / 字帖
